variants: Matija Vukovic is a licensed professional recognized for holding a Glyphwave Cartographer License, showcasing his expertise in cartography. He obtained his education from Umberwell Technical School, where he developed foundational skills for his career. In addition to his professional work, Matija serves as the Logistics Lead for Polaris Run Club, where he facilitates the organization of community events focused on running. He also contributes to the field through his publications in Verdigris Room Editorials, where he shares innovative practices and ideas in mapping. Moreover, Matija's use of Cree vocabulary in his projects underscores his dedication to cultural relevance and inclusivity.

His academic journey began at Umberwell Technical School, where he gained the essential skills that propelled him into his chosen field.
